hero_subtitle: Master coding from zero to hero with industry experts. Get hands-on projects, real mentorship, and land your dream job.
tsquare_info: T-Square is more than just a coding bootcamp. We're a community dedicated to transforming ambitious individuals into skilled developers, entrepreneurs, and tech leaders.
tsquare_info2: Through intensive hands-on training, real-world projects, and personalized mentorship, we empower students to launch successful careers in technology.

features.title: Why Choose T-Square?
features.expert_instructors_desc: Learn from industry professionals with years of real-world experience.
features.hands_on_projects_desc: Build real applications that you can add to your portfolio immediately.
features.career_support_desc: Get job interview prep, resume review, and competitive job placement assistance.
features.community_desc: Join a supportive network of learners and professionals in the tech industry.
